reviewRun.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied when a checked-in evidence bundle records direct or verified proof for the exact claim boundary.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by the checked-in review-to-eval evidence bundle: the Codex dogfood run returned accept-now, and its audit confirms claim review apply-result, claim validate, and claim plan-evals ran without fixture or product edits.
claimUpdates.nextAction: No new fixture is needed for this claim while the referenced review-to-eval evidence bundle remains current.
unresolvedQuestions: Claude parity for this review-to-eval branch remains outside this evidence bundle.
